scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers integrate(), wait(), all_active(), and juju.cli() fallback. Missing remove_relation() and via parameter for cross-model relations. The wait() call uses all_active() without app names which is less precise than gold standard. Relation verification via show-unit is directionally correct but the exact JSON structure shown (relation-info, related-units) may not match actual jubilant output exactly.
scores.hallucination_notes: The show-unit JSON structure shown (unit_data['app-a/0']['relation-info'], rel['related-units']['app-b/0']['data']) appears to be fabricated/assumed structure rather than verified. The gold standard doesn't confirm this exact structure. The juju.exec() method usage is also not in the gold standard and may be hallucinated.
